ranked_movies.title: Children of Men
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and highly praised across multiple threads for its dystopian realism, powerful themes, incredible cinematography, and emotional impact. It was the subject of its own dedicated, highly-upvoted post and also recommended in threads about tense films and must-watch movies.

ranked_movies.title: The Act of Killing
ranked_movies.reason: Top recommendation in both the 'traumatizing movie' and 'mind-blowing documentary' threads. Described as a genuinely good film that is also deeply unsettling and eye-opening.

ranked_movies.title: Irreversible
ranked_movies.reason: A primary recommendation for a movie that will 'traumatize' viewers. Noted for its intentional use of sound to create a visceral, nauseating experience and its brutal, impactful storytelling.

ranked_movies.title: Happiness
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a chilling and traumatizing 'comedy' with dark, intersecting storylines and heavy themes, making it a standout recommendation for films that severely affect the viewer.

ranked_movies.title: Mysterious Skin
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended as a film that 'shook me to my core' and is extremely dark, often listed alongside other traumatizing movies for its profound impact.

ranked_movies.title: Train to Busan
ranked_movies.reason: Top comment in the 'edge of your seat' thread, described as relentless and so intense that viewers needed a break afterward to recover from the experience.

ranked_movies.title: No Country for Old Men
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended for its constant suspense and tension, creating an atmosphere where viewers are constantly questioning character fates.

ranked_movies.title: Uncut Gems
ranked_movies.reason: A primary example of an anxiety-inducing, tense film that keeps viewers on the edge of their seat from start to finish.

ranked_movies.title: Sicario
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a film that maintains a high level of suspense and tension throughout, fitting the request for edge-of-your-seat experiences.

ranked_movies.title: Green Room
ranked_movies.reason: Directly recommended as a film that is incredibly tense and will keep viewers on the edge of their seat.

ranked_movies.title: Lost in Translation
ranked_movies.reason: A top recommendation for movies about 'people being real,' praised for its beautifully written human moments and poetic feel.

ranked_movies.title: The Station Agent
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended for its portrayal of real human moments and early Peter Dinklage role, epitomizing the request for no-frills, human-centric stories.

ranked_movies.title: Good Will Hunting
ranked_movies.reason: A classic recommendation for films focused on human emotion, growth, and healing, without relying on explosions or twists.

ranked_movies.title: As Good As It Gets
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its focus on human relationships, awkwardness, and growth, fitting the request for real human stories.

ranked_movies.title: The Jinx
ranked_movies.reason: A top recommendation for a mind-blowing documentary, described as intense and eye-opening.

ranked_movies.title: Three Identical Strangers
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a documentary that completely changes one's perspective and is utterly mind-blowing.

ranked_movies.title: Watership Down
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a film that will 'fuck you up,' known for its traumatic and impactful animated story.

ranked_movies.title: Kids
ranked_movies.reason: Often cited as a traumatizing film with an ending 'burned in memory,' dealing with heavy themes like HIV and teenage life.

ranked_movies.title: Logan
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of a highly-upvoted post discussing movies that exceeded expectations, praised for its brutal action, character development, and story, calling it a masterpiece.

ranked_movies.title: Galaxy Quest
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned multiple times in threads about movies that were unexpectedly fantastic, praised for its humor, perfect cast, and becoming a beloved classic against initial low expectations.
